text:
うーん、名前で呼ぶの
やっぱり慣れないわねぇ。
なーんか気持ち悪くない？

ま、いいか。
それよりも依頼よ依頼。
アンタの活躍、見せてちょうだい！

へっぽこぴーに逆戻りしないように
頑張って

I know what I said before, but I'm STILL not
used to calling you by your name.
It feels weird, doesn't it? No? Just me?

Whatever, I guess. Anyway, I'm placing an
Order with you. Let me see you at your best!
Try not to get busted back to clown status!
